reason: Two known gaps: (1) D5 onset at 12.67s — recognizer picks C5 residual as primary, D5 only as secondary. (2) C5 re-attack at ~13.47s — very short re-pluck with clear mute-dip (C5: 11→0.5→13) but onset detector fires during mute (13.448s) when E5 residual dominates spectrum, masking the C5 re-attack that peaks at ~13.51s. Both require forward-scan of per-note re-attack within segment.
